overview: WedBridge is India's trusted wedding vendor marketplace. Couples discover and shortlist verified photographers, decorators, caterers, mehendi artists, venues, and more across 10+ Indian cities. Features include city and category filtering, a private Vendor Basket for shortlisting, destination wedding support, a community feed, vendor self-registration, and subscription plans including a Concierge tier where WedBridge advisors manage the vendor's entire digital presence.
features: Browse verified wedding vendors by city and category
Vendor Basket — private shortlist with notes, invisible to vendors
Destination wedding section for NRI and travel couples
Community feed — share wedding journeys, tips, and experiences
Five subscription plans: Free, Standard, Premium, Destination Hub, Concierge
Concierge plan — dedicated WedBridge advisor handles profile, leads, and social media for the vendor
Admin panel for managing platform content and community posts
Onboarding modal for new users (city, role, language preferences)
Supabase backend with fallback to local sample data
